section.heading: Why Nova Webs?
section.subtitle: We don't just build websites. We build digital growth engines.
section.label: Why Us

reasons.title: Results-Driven
reasons.description: Every pixel is designed to convert. We don't do 'pretty' without 'profitable.'

reasons.title: Premium Design
reasons.description: Award-worthy aesthetics that elevate your brand above competitors. We bring global design standards to Lahore.

reasons.title: Local Expertise
reasons.description: Lahore-based with global standards. We understand the local market while delivering world-class quality.

reasons.title: Ongoing Support
reasons.description: We don't disappear after launch. Long-term partnership is our model. We succeed when you succeed.

reasons.title: Technical Excellence
reasons.description: Modern tech stack, clean code, and rigorous testing. Every project is built to perform, scale, and last.

reasons.title: Transparent Process
reasons.description: No black boxes. You'll know exactly what we're doing, when, and why. Communication is our priority.
